log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Kender — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):18+6=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15

→ Kender — Bardic Musician: SUCCESS. 17 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
